title: Roblox Generative AI Push Metaverse Revenue Up 5.5% YoY in Q3 2023
text: Roblox's generative AI initiatives contributed to metaverse revenue growth of 5.5% year-over-year in Q3 2023. The company integrated AI tools into its developer platform to streamline content creation processes. These tools aimed to democratize game development by enabling creators without extensive coding experience to build interactive experiences. Q3 2023 results showed revenue of approximately $820 million, reflecting strong year-over-year growth amid the company's broader AI and technology investments. Daily active users reached 122.46 million, demonstrating robust user acquisition trends. Bookings of $1.70 billion showed 50% year-over-year growth, underscoring the platform's monetization success. Total hours engaged reached 29.49 billion, up significantly from 20.70 billion in Q3 2022. The company's focus on generative AI differentiated Roblox from competitors and positioned it uniquely to benefit from the growing demand for AI-assisted development tools. Management highlighted potential for AI to expand creator participation and accelerate content production on the platform. Industry analysts noted that Roblox's AI investments could drive sustained competitive advantages in the metaverse space.
